name: Green Onion Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Egg yolk
2. 1 cup chopped green onions
3. 3 tablespoons white vinegar
4. 1 tablespoon Creole mustard
5. 1/4 teaspoon chopped garlic clove
6. 1/2 teaspoon sugar
7. 1/2 teaspoon salt
8. 1/2 teaspoon white pepper
9. 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce
10. 1 cup vegetable oil
Combine all ingredients in a screw-top jar; shake well.
